title: Document HIR phase-indexed shared-core model
body:
## What was done

Documented the **HIR** as a phase-indexed shared core: which nodes exist at which pipeline stage, how later passes mutate or replace subtrees, and where normalization/desugar plugs in.

## Why it mattered

Pecan was experimenting with **staged** analysis (parse → lower → resolve → type) before Beskid unified those phases under `beskid_pipeline`. The HIR doc prevented ad-hoc AST copies per pass.

## Outcome

Foundation for normalization (`hir-normalization-for-desugar`), `HirQuery` traversal, and visitor refactors in the same deliverable.

source.subject: Add HIR documentation structure and phase-indexed shared-core model foundation
